name: Twitter Fake News Detector
description: This project aims to classify Tweets as either fake news or real news based on a dataset containing information about both tweets and their users. The classification is done using machine learning models built with Python and scikit-learn. Libraries Used: pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib. The project was later built with anvil for a more visual representation.

name: Podtracker
description: This project fetched an RSS feed, specifically for podcasts. The focus was on solid architecture, using a classic 3-layer structure consisting of a data layer, business layer, and presentation layer (along with models). The visible design is simple, while the underlying data structure is more complex and secure.

name: Map game
description: (Still in progress!) This project is part of an educational platform. It is a map game where the user places a marker on a specific location. It uses MapLibre for map components and C#, .NET, and SQL for backend functionality. It builds on previously developed work, using Razor Pages and Blazor, with MudBlazor components, and is hosted on Azure.
